# programs.eza

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `programs.eza`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `programs.eza.colors` | `one of <null>, “auto”, “always”, “never”` | Use terminal colors in output ( --color argument). |
| `programs.eza.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable eza, a modern replacement for ls . |
| `programs.eza.enableAliases` | | |
| `programs.eza.enableBashIntegration` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Bash integration. |
| `programs.eza.enableFishIntegration` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Fish integration. |
| `programs.eza.enableIonIntegration` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Ion integration. |
| `programs.eza.enableNushellIntegration` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Nushell integration. |
| `programs.eza.enableZshIntegration` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Zsh integration. |
| `programs.eza.extraOptions` | `list of string` | Extra command line options passed to eza. |
| `programs.eza.git` | `boolean` | List each file’s Git status if tracked or ignored ( --git argument). |
| `programs.eza.icons` | `one of <null>, true, false, “auto”, “always”, “never”` | Display icons next to file names ( --icons argument). |
| `programs.eza.package` | `null or package` | The eza package to use. |
| `programs.eza.theme` | `YAML 1.1 value` | Written to $XDG_CONFIG_HOME/eza/theme.yml |
